labels.visual: A bare, lamplit chamber. Close walls. A plain wooden chair faces us. NARRATOR sits in it - a lean man of middle years, pale skin, dark hair disordered, waistcoa…

labels.prev: He steadies his hands on his knees. A thin smile.

labels.visual: OLD MAN sits by a shuttered window - elderly, thin, white hair, dressing gown. He turns. One pale blue eye shows a milky film: the vulture eye.

labels.prev: NARRATOR sets the tray with care. Pats the coverlet. The kindness is perfect - and false.
Pitch black. Shutters close-fastened. NARRATOR eases his head through the opening, then the dark lan…

labels.visual: On the bed, OLD MAN stirs suddenly, as if startled. NARRATOR's head is already in. He does not draw back. He pushes the door on steadily, steadily. Black as pit…

labels.prev: OLD MAN upright in the dark, listening. Time stretches. A slight groan - low, stifled - mortal terro…
NARRATOR, head still within the room, waits. Patient. Then - stealthily - opens a very little crevic…

labels.visual: A low, dull, quick sound - such as a watch makes when enveloped in cotton. The beating of the OLD MAN's heart. It quickens. Louder. Louder. NARRATOR holds the l…
He refrains still - some minutes longer - standing frozen while the beat fills the dark.
With a loud yell NARRATOR throws open the lantern and leaps into the room. OLD MAN shrieks once - once only. NARRATOR drags him to the floor and pulls the heavy…

labels.prev: Candlelight. NARRATOR works hastily, in silence. A tub stands ready. He dismembers the corpse - head…

labels.visual: NARRATOR ushers them in. Shows the old man's treasures - secure, undisturbed. In the enthusiasm of his confidence he brings chairs and places them. He sets his …

labels.prev: The OFFICERS sit. They chat of familiar things. NARRATOR answers cheerily. Singularly at ease. Then …
He rises. Argues about trifles in a high key, violent gesticulations. The noise steadily increases.

labels.visual: He cannot bear the hypocritical smiles. The beat pounds - again - louder - louder - louder - louder!
